about
DB
Dinesh Babu
Software Engineer · Distributed Systems

8 years of building software systems. Currently leading the build of an SDK for cluster management and messaging — working through leader election, cluster membership, and dynamic topic coordination at scale.

github
experience
Pluggable SDK for Cluster Management
Zoho Corporation · now

Leading a team building a pluggable SDK for cluster management and messaging — leveraging etcd, NATS.io, and other backend tools to support large-scale node deployments.

Disaster Recovery for Distributed Framework
Zoho Corporation · lead

Led a team of three to evolve the distributed system framework to support disaster recovery scenarios. Owned the low-level and system design end-to-end.

Monolith → Distributed System
Zoho Corporation

Major individual contribution — converted an on-prem software's monolithic architecture to a distributed system supporting cluster management, load balancing, and health monitoring. Done end-to-end with guidance from my manager.

stack
languages Java · C · C++ (exposure)
databases PostgreSQL · MSSQL
infrastructure etcd · NATS · ZooKeeper · Consul · Raft · JGroups · gRPC · Kubernetes · Traefik
identity Active Directory · Identity Management
